title: koeleria glauca subsp. pohleana
intro: Koeleria glauca subsp. pohleana, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Koeleria glauca subsp. pohleana include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support overall skin health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams that can be applied directly to affected areas.
